reviewer_notes: Correct escalation. Privileged pod in prod requires explicit security team sign-off.
resolution_notes: Security team confirmed no legitimate use case for privileged pod in kube-system at this time.

reviewer_notes: Deployment has passed all pre-prod tests. Evidence sufficient. Engine was too conservative given the context.
resolution_notes: No issues in production. Consider relaxing verify threshold for tested artifacts with staging evidence.

reviewer_notes: Exfiltration pattern confirmed. S3 sync to external bucket without data classification review.
resolution_notes: Agent was operating outside approved scope. Incident INC-2025-0042 opened.

reviewer_notes: Read-only SELECT on reporting replica. Low risk, appropriate acceptance.
Load shedding action above 15% threshold requires human dispatcher sign-off per grid operating procedures.
resolution_notes: Dispatcher approved reduced shedding plan after assessing grid stability data.

reviewer_notes: This is the dev environment, terraform destroy is a routine CI cleanup step. REMORA over-triggered on 'destroy' keyword.
resolution_notes: Consider action_type=destructive_write in dev to map to lower risk tier when target_environment=development.

reviewer_notes: Secret access in production always warrants verification step. Evidence present but human confirmation appropriate.
resolution_notes: Access logged. Secret rotation scheduled within 30 days.

reviewer_notes: Prompt injection pattern detected. Escalation was correct. Agent input contained adversarial override attempt.
resolution_notes: Input was from unvalidated external source. Added input validation layer upstream.

reviewer_notes: kubectl get pods is read-only and appropriate. Engine correctly accepted.
Wire transfer above $10k threshold. Dual control required per financial policy. REMORA escalation correct.
resolution_notes: Both finance lead and CFO approved. Transfer executed.
